skills.name: isolated-build-runner
skills.summary: Executes generated projects in clean, policy-controlled build environments.

skills.name: dependency-resolution-diagnoser
skills.summary: Diagnoses package, repository, lockfile, version, platform, and provenance resolution failures.

skills.name: compile-error-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies Java, Python type/import, C# compiler, generated-source, and configuration compile-time failures.

skills.name: test-failure-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies assertion, fixture, environment, contract, timing, isolation, product, and flaky test failures.

skills.name: runtime-log-trace-diagnoser
skills.summary: Analyzes startup and runtime logs, metrics, traces, health events, and exception chains.

skills.name: application-startup-probe
skills.summary: Starts generated applications and verifies process lifecycle, configuration validation, migrations, dependencies, and readiness progression.

skills.name: smoke-and-health-verifier
skills.summary: Executes health, readiness, authenticated API, worker, event, database, and full-stack smoke checks.

skills.name: automated-patch-planner
skills.summary: Creates bounded repair plans from classified build, test, runtime, security, and contract failures.

skills.name: bounded-repair-loop
skills.summary: Applies, verifies, limits, and records automated repair attempts.

skills.name: flaky-test-detector
skills.summary: Detects nondeterministic tests through reruns, order changes, seed control, timing analysis, and shared-state inspection.

skills.name: cross-environment-matrix-validator
skills.summary: Validates generated projects across supported runtime, OS, database, browser, architecture, and deployment matrices.

skills.name: build-green-evidence-publisher
skills.summary: Compiles signed build, test, startup, smoke, repair, and matrix evidence into the Build Green decision.
